pi_items.source: setup_task.sh script where the ODT file is generated and saved to this path.
setup_task.sh script where the guide text is written to this path.
setup_task.sh script showing the generation of the ODT document with these exact misspellings injected into the text.
setup_task.sh script containing the OCR guide which dictates these specific corrections.
setup_task.sh script generates headers with the year 'l804', which become the metadata values after the prescribed OCR correction to '1804', and verifier.py checks these exact strings.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for calligra_words_env historical_diary_ocr_remediation task. Verified that the Lewis and Clark journal data is synthetically generated via a python script in setup_task.sh. Confirmed the exact injected OCR errors ('moming', 'govemment', 'agarnst', 'l804') and their required corrections match the metadata and verifier logic. Also confirmed the expected headers, document path, and OCR guide path.
